name: Judgment for Damages from Revenue Officer Misconduct

eligibility.description: Applies to parties injured by federal revenue officers or employees acting under color of law who commit extortion, demand unauthorized sums, or engage in fraud.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers injured by the unlawful acts of a revenue officer (such as extortion or fraudulent entries) are entitled to a court judgment for damages sustained.
